content.text: mcp-issue-loop build playbook. Issue #52 in umbraco/Umbraco-CMS-MCP-Editor, label ready-for-ai. Add rollback-widget tool. Model tier: sonnet.

content.content: CI FAILED: -32602 invalid params: versionId is not a valid uuid

content.text: Root cause: versionId used z.string().uuid() but Umbraco returns non-RFC-4122 GUIDs. Switched to z.guid(). PR #141 green on attempt 2.
